Product journey

From fragmented spreadsheets to one connected group workflow

Follow the path finance teams take with GATHER.nexus: overview, solution, and each core module in one place.

01 Platform overview

The Platform for Finance Teams in Xero & QuickBooks Multi-Entity Groups

GATHER.nexus helps Finance teams manage Intercompany Control, Group Financial Reporting, and Group Financial Planning on one unified platform.

  • Intercompany ControlAutomate matching, reconciliations, and eliminations.
  • Group Financial ReportingConsolidate data and close faster with confidence.
  • Group Financial PlanningPlan, forecast, and analyze across your entire group.
The challengeFragmented multi-entity finance
SpreadsheetsDisconnected toolsManual close
GATHER.NEXUS: The Solution

The Solution

GATHER.nexus provides a fully integrated workflow covering Intercompany Control, Group Financial Reporting, and Group Financial Planning.

Each module is purpose-built for Group finance, replacing disconnected spreadsheets with a single, auditable, real-time workflow.

  • Intercompany Control
  • Group Financial Reporting
  • Group Financial Planning
Unified platformXero & QuickBooks connected
Xero / QBGATHER.nexusGroup outputs
Module 01: Intercompany Control

Intercompany Control

A central hub for intercompany activity across all Group entities, with full balance visibility and always-accurate relationships.

Built on a quadruple-entry posting framework, automating journals, invoices, and bills synced in real time to Xero and QuickBooks.

  • Quadruple-entry posting framework
  • Multi-currency support
  • Recharge by GL, vendor, customer, or tracking category
  • Full transaction audit trail
Find out more
Module 01Intercompany workflow
Post
Matrix
Reconcile
Module 02: Group Financial Reporting

Group Financial Reporting

A five-step consolidation workflow, from Group Reporting Template setup through AI-assisted mapping, autojournals, and Working Papers to final reports.

Native handling of complex consolidation scenarios and audit-ready FX differences in Reserves tracking.

  • Create GRT: build your Group Reporting Template
  • Map GRT with AI Assistant
  • Create Autojournals: automated consolidation journals
  • Review Working Papers: three-level drill-down
  • Generate Reports: industry-specific consolidated reports
Find out more
Module 02Consolidation workflow
GRT
Map
Report
Module 05: Group Financial Planning

Integrated Group Planning & Actuals vs Budget

Create divisional and functional budgets, roll them up into a consolidated Group budget, then compare against live actuals across the Group.

A structured, delegated planning workflow connected to intercompany control and group reporting in one unified performance view.

  • Create divisional/functional budgets
  • Roll up budgets to create a Group budget
  • Compare budgets to actuals: three-level variance drill-down
Find out more

Platform Features

The Three Pillars of Your New Finance Stack

Every module works together as one connected system, not a set of disconnected tools.

Select a pillar
01
Pillar 01

Automated Group Financial Reporting

Five connected steps, from Group Reporting Template setup to consolidated report generation.

Create GRT

Define your Group Reporting Template once, the consolidated chart of accounts every entity rolls up into.

Map GRT with AI Assistant

Connect entity GL accounts from Xero and QuickBooks with GATHER AI recommendations and confidence scoring.

Autojournals to Reports

Automated consolidation journals, audit-ready working papers with three-level drill-down, and industry-specific reports.

Explore Group Reporting
02
Pillar 02

Total Intercompany Control

A central hub for intercompany activity, automated, reconciled, and always in balance.

Quadruple-Entry Posting

Automate journals, invoices, and bills with counterparty entries syncing in real time to Xero and QuickBooks.

Real-Time In-Month Visibility

Matrix and timeline views give finance teams instant visibility of intercompany balances throughout the month.

Continuous Reconciliation

Automated intercompany reconciliation validated against consolidation working papers.

Explore Intercompany Control
03
Pillar 03

Unified Group Planning

Three connected steps, from divisional budgets through Group roll-up to actuals vs budget analysis.

Divisional Budgets

Create and delegate budgets at division, department, or functional level across entities.

Group Budget Roll-Up

Roll up divisional and entity budgets automatically into a consolidated Group budget.

Actuals vs Budget

Compare budgets to live actuals with three-level variance drill-down across the Group.

Explore Group Planning

Don't settle for "black box" reports. GATHER.nexus features a unique rapid drill-down functionality, from your Consolidated Group Result all the way to Individual Transaction-Level Data in seconds, ensuring total validation at every level.

The GATHER Difference

One platform. One auditable path.

Intercompany control, consolidation, and planning are not bolted together after the fact, they share one ledger path from posting through working papers to group variance.

Audit-ready working papers

FX in reserves, eliminations, and full transaction trails, built for review, not spreadsheet rebuilds.

Multi-entity, multi-currency

Scale across groups and periods with three-level drill-down from consolidated result to ledger detail.

Native Xero & QuickBooks sync

One-click sync across mixed-entity groups, journals and actuals stay live in the same workflow.

  1. 01
    Intercompany Quadruple-entry posting, matching, and balances across every entity pair.
  2. 02
    Working papers The audit hub, eliminations, adjustments, and IC validated against consolidation.
  3. 03
    Consolidation GRT, AI mapping, autojournals, and industry-ready group reports.
  4. 04
    Planning Budgets roll up to the Group view and compare live against consolidated actuals.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about GATHER.nexus.

The GATHER Platform is hosted entirely on Microsoft Azure Cloud, certified and compliant with ISO 27001, SOC 2, and GDPR. All data is encrypted in transit (SSL) and at rest using Azure's built-in encryption. GATHER.nexus is an approved Xero integration partner and undergoes regular security audits. Payment processing is handled by Stripe (PCI-DSS compliant). Your data is 100% owned by you and is never shared with any third parties.
GATHER AI is underpinned by Microsoft Azure AI. Our first AI feature enables auto-mapping from underlying Xero or QuickBooks General Ledger accounts to Group Reporting Templates. No customer-specific financial data is shared with the AI engine, only the account name, account ID and account type are shared in encrypted format.
Multi-entity businesses operate across more than one legal entity, common in VC or PE backed scale-ups expanding internationally. GATHER delivers apps across three key areas: Group (Consolidated) Financial Reporting, Group Financial Control (including Intercompany Control), and Group (Consolidated) Financial Planning.
The GATHER Platform is built for Finance teams in businesses with a multi-entity corporate structure integrating with Xero and QuickBooks. Our features particularly benefit Finance teams in venture or PE backed scale-up businesses and Fractional CFOs who work with such businesses.
GATHER.nexus offers seamless integration with Xero and QuickBooks with a single click, allowing you to import and manage your financial data effortlessly across all your legal entities. Users may create Groups of legal entities which are a mixture of Xero and QuickBooks entities.
Users may access a 30-day Free Trial Period, during which they have access to all the features of the GATHER Platform, as well as benefiting from regular new features added to the Platform. No credit card required.
Pricing packages are tailored according to (a) which multi-entity applications you wish to use and (b) how many Groups of companies you wish to manage on the Platform. In each case, users pay a monthly subscription fee. Full details are on our pricing page.
You can upgrade at any time, fees are paid monthly in advance. If you decide to downgrade or cancel, you may do so with 14 days notice and your current plan will elapse at the end of the month in which the notice period completes.

Still have questions?

Our team is happy to walk you through the platform, answer pricing questions, or set up a personalised demo for your finance team.
